approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized the safe extractor queue after public YouTube Build Intel queue prep, with explicit instruction to avoid live extraction, private auth, paid access, external writes, Drive mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, Agent Feedback auto-send, and hidden subagents unless separately approved.
scopeSummary: Define proposal-only routing from source-backed extractor artifacts into KB draft, atom, synthesis fact, review, and action-route candidates; prove missing source/citation/freshness/privacy/contradiction, side-effect, and direct-write variants fail closed.
notApproved: Do not search YouTube or the public web or call source APIs.
Do not fetch transcripts, capture screenshots/keyframes, download videos, summarize content, run vision, or call a model.
Do not use paid/private/community/course auth, Skool, MyICOR, Loom, or authorized-browser sessions.
Do not write Research Inbox rows, KB pages, atoms, synthesis facts, action routes, vector/query indexes, or backlog content from extracted material.
Do not mutate Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, Agent Feedback, or external systems.
Do not launch hidden subagents, parallel builders, or extraction workers.
